lineage.Process: CreateLocator CAN "M:\Processing_Scripts\Create_Locator_Service\results\processing.gdb\SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB PointAddress" 'PointAddress.HOUSE_NUMBER SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.house_number';'PointAddress.STREET_PREFIX_DIR SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.St_PreDir';'PointAddress.STREET_PREFIX_TYPE SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.St_PreTyp';'PointAddress.STREET_NAME SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.St_Name';'PointAddress.STREET_SUFFIX_TYPE SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.St_PosTyp';'PointAddress.STREET_SUFFIX_DIR SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.St_PosDir';'PointAddress.FULL_STREET_NAME SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.full_street_name';'PointAddress.BUILDING_NAME SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.Building';'PointAddress.SUB_ADDRESS_UNIT SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.Unit';'PointAddress.SUB_ADDRESS_LEVEL SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.Floor';'PointAddress.PARCEL_JOIN_ID SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.i_gis_key';'PointAddress.NEIGHBORHOOD SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.Nbrhd_Comm';'PointAddress.REGION_ABBR SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.Prov_Abbriviation';'PointAddress.COUNTRY SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.Country';'PointAddress.SUB_ADDRESS_UNIT_FROM SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.i_sub_Addr_unit_from';'PointAddress.SUB_ADDRESS_UNIT_TO SiteStructureAddressPoints_GDB.i_sub_Addr_unit_to' M:\Processing_Scripts\Create_Locator_Service\locators\address_points_l.loc ENG # # # LOCAL_EXTRA_HIGH CURRENT_VERSION
